annotations.target_description: ArraySubs submenu section in the left WordPress admin sidebar

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the subscription status filter tabs near the top of the table and label it "Status filters".

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the search field and gateway dropdown and label it "Find subscriptions".

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the Add New Subscription and Export CSV buttons and label it "Create or export".

annotations.request_text: Draw a red rectangle around the View Details and Edit row actions in the first visible subscription row and label it "Row actions".
annotations.target_description: View Details and Edit action links in the first visible subscription row with hover actions shown
